{% if site_versions %} {% set branch = current_branch or "dev" %} {# Determine version type for styling #} {% set version_class = "" %} {% if branch == latest_version %} {% set version_class = "version-latest" %} {% elif "rc" in branch or "alpha" in branch or "beta" in branch %} {% set version_class = "version-prerelease" %} {% elif branch == "main" %} {% set version_class = "version-development" %} {% elif not branch.startswith('v') and branch != "main" %} {% set version_class = "version-current" %} {% endif %}
VTL Engine Docs v: {{ branch.lstrip('v') }}
Versions
{% for ver in site_versions %} {% set display = ver.lstrip('v') %} {% if ver == branch %}
{{ display }} {% if ver == latest_version %} (latest) {% elif "rc" in ver %} (pre-release) {% elif ver == "main" %} (development) {% elif not ver.startswith('v') and ver != "main" %} (current) {% endif %}
{% else %} {% if ver == latest_version %}
{{ display }} {% else %}
{{ display }} {% endif %} {% if ver == latest_version %} (latest) {% elif "rc" in ver %} (pre-release) {% elif ver == "main" %} (development) {% elif not ver.startswith('v') and ver != "main" %} (current) {% endif %}
{% endif %} {% endfor %}
{% endif %}
